creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
Created attachment 247673
diff -u patch to Makefile to fix problem

Latest version of math/lapack installs 8,605 identical MacOS (apparently) metadata files as if they are man pages.

These all start with ._

e.g.:

man3/._zunmtr.f.3
man3/._zunt01.3
man3/._zunt01.f.3
man3/._zunt03.3
man3/._zunt03.f.3
man3/._zupgtr.3
man3/._zupgtr.f.3
man3/._zupmtr.3
man3/._zupmtr.f.3
man3/._zzero.3
  
etc.

The attached patch fixed that:
